hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo "[pre-push] Running lint, type-check, and tests..." >&2; if ! out=$(npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm test 2>&1); then echo "[pre-push] FAILED — fix the lint/type/test errors below before pushing." >&2; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -40 >&2; exit 2; fi; echo "[pre-push] All checks passed." >&2; fi
